final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a UI design system mockup showcasing a classic minimal tech aesthetic across web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: clean flat vector UI design system sheet, minimal tech aesthetic inspired by Linear and Vercel design language, dark-mode-first with precise grid alignment
Composition: multi-panel layout arranged on a single artboard — web Dashboard panel (top-left, largest), mobile interface panel (top-right), component library grid (bottom row: cards, buttons, toggles, sliders, input fields), generous white-space gutters between panels
Subject: cohesive UI system featuring a web Dashboard with data charts and sidebar nav, a mobile screen with card feed, and a component row with buttons (primary/secondary/ghost), toggle switches, progress bars, and input controls — all sharing a unified design token system
Scene/backdrop: neutral near-black (#0D0D0F) artboard background, subtle grid dot pattern at low opacity
Lighting/mood: layered depth via elevation shadows and subtle inner glows on active states, cool blue accent light suggesting screen luminance, sharp and precise
Color palette: deep charcoal base (#0D0D0F) as foundation, electric blue (#3B82F6) as primary accent, cyan (#06B6D4) as secondary highlight, white (#FFFFFF) for primary text, mid-gray (#6B7280) for secondary text — accent colors used sparingly to maximize contrast hierarchy
Materials/textures: frosted glass card surfaces with 8% white fill and 1px border at 15% white, smooth flat button fills, no gradients except subtle linear overlay on hero chart area
Constraints: all components must be legible at 1x screen resolution; spacing follows an 8pt grid; interactive states (default / hover / active / disabled) shown for buttons and controls; monochrome version must retain full hierarchy
Avoid: skeuomorphic shadows, rainbow gradients, lens flare, generic Dribbble shot glow effects, overcrowded layout, decorative circuit board textures, 8K stuffer aesthetic
